title: Printer Court Transcript
text:
## Printer Court Transcript

**Judge:** Court is now in session for the case of Office vs. The {adjective} Printer.

**Charge:** Refusing to {verb} during a {number}-page presentation.

**Witness:** {person} states the machine made a {sound}, flashed a {color} light, and demanded {plural noun}.

**Evidence:** One jammed {object}, three {adjective} toner cartridges, and a note reading DO NOT {verb}.

**Verdict:** Guilty of {adverb} wasting lunch.

**Sentence:** Relocation to the {place} until morale improves.
